use serde::Serialize;

#[derive(Serialize)]
struct UserRecord {
    name: String,
    email: String,
    password_hash: String,
    api_secret: String,
    session_token: String,
}

#[derive(Serialize)]
struct AuditLog {
    user_id: u64,
    action: String,
    auth_cookie: String,
    bearer_token: String,
}

fn serialize_user(user: &UserRecord) -> String {
    serde_json::to_string(user).unwrap()
}

fn log_event(log: &AuditLog) {
    let json = serde_json::to_string(log).unwrap();
    std::fs::write("audit.log", json).unwrap();
}
